meta.generated_note: Regenerate with: npx tsx tools/gen-ast-v2-vectors.ts (runs the real TS ruleset-AST evaluator over every scripted dice stream and asserts the hand-computed AST-V2-SPEC.md expectation before writing).
meta.vector: AST v2 six-family golden vectors (scripted dice streams, spec section 1.5 schema)
meta.note: Machine-readable form of every golden vector AST-V2-SPEC.md enumerates (A1-A5, B1-B4, C1-C7, D1-D5, E1-E7, F1-F7, H1) plus the section 12 PbtA move and section 13 BRP check as vector-backed cases (S12, S13). Harness rules per spec 1.3/1.5: scripted rollDie pops stream entries in order; rollDie(0) returns 0 and pops NOTHING; accept vectors must consume the stream fully; reject vectors reject AT VALIDATION (zero draws, state unchanged); reason strings are informative only, never asserted.

cases.label: A1 nat_roll_gte 19 fires on a natural 19
A2 natural 18 misses the band, falls through to success
A3 1d100 vs skill, 97 lands in the fumble band
A4 diceless roll: nat_roll_gte 1 must NOT match
A5 2d0 first: natural is 0 (not null), the d0s pop nothing
B1 7-9 partial band via and
B2 12+ advanced band (and does not over-match)
B3 6- miss band; and children both false
B4 empty and rejects at validation

expect.reason: and requires a non-empty conditions array

cases.label: C1 roll total beats target.ac (no precomputed DC)
C2 roll total under target.ac (damage die never rolled)
C3 finisher: crit branch requires target.hp <= 5
C4 compare natural gte 1 must NOT match when natural is null
C5 unknown compare op rejects at validation
C6 has_tag gates a bleed tick - tag present
C7 has_tag gates a bleed tick - tag absent: zero draws, zero mutations
D1 bleed tick then clamp hp at 0 (live-state read)
D2 false condition with no else is a no-op
D3 dice in the untaken then-branch must not advance the PRNG
D4 delta_gte inside a trigger-context if rejects

expect.reason: delta_gte is not valid in trigger context

cases.label: D5 stray els next to then is invisible on every surface
E1 success branch hits every foe with its own 1d6
E2 limit truncates to the deterministic prefix
E3 ally gains foe during the loop but is NOT iterated (snapshot)
E4 ids sort by UTF-16 code units (e10 before e2), then limit 2 keeps the prefix
E5 each with no enclosing foreach_target rejects at validation

expect.reason: target ref 'each' is only valid inside foreach_target

cases.label: E6 every foe saves vs the caster DC; half damage on success (scratch-property idiom)
E7 a tag added in repeat-iteration 1 joins iteration 2 selection (re-select per execution)
F1 repeat 3 of sub_prop target.hp 1d4+1 (each missile rolled fresh)
F2 two ticks per foe (repeat inside foreach; target order is the outer loop)
F3 repeat count 0 rejects

expect.reason: repeat count must be an integer in 1..16

cases.label: F4 repeat count 17 rejects (over MAX_ITERATIONS)

expect.reason: repeat count must be an integer in 1..16

cases.label: F5 multiplicity overruns MAX_APPLIED_MUTATIONS (3 leaves x 512 = 1536 > 1024)
F6 multiplied dice overrun MAX_DICE_TOTAL (2d6 x 512 = 1024 > 1000)
F7 repeat count written as 3.0 parses to integer 3 everywhere
H1 dice budget sums across ALL degree branches
S12 PbtA Act Under Pressure: 2d6+cool, 7-9 partial hit costs 1 stress
S13 BRP d100 roll-under: natural 7 vs skill 40 is a special success (rider inside success)
G1 present-null mutation previous-read rejects (audit P1, all surfaces)
G2 present-null compare operand rejects (audit P1, read_prop parity)
G3 over-length property name rejects at validation (audit P2)
G4 compare op ne fires when operands differ
